Gregory Charles Miller was charged with intent to do great bodily harm, less than murder, in addition to assault with intent to murder. His bond was set at $1 million. On November 27th, 2023, Gregory pleaded guilty to assault with intent to commit great bodily harm, less than murder. The charge of assault with intent to murder was dismissed, and his sentencing is scheduled for late January of 2024. William Cracker checked himself into the hospital a few hours after his interview with Deputy Weekly. His injuries were minor and he was released without complications. Gregory's cancer prognosis is unknown at this time.
